_comment: Golden cases for the Student Code of Conduct cluster (Phase 4 coverage). Grounded in the newly crawled VU_CTSV02 Student Code of Conduct + disciplinary appendices (policy.vinuni.edu.vn). Facts/sources were validated against the real agent answers on the coverage collection so they are fair. These test GENUINELY NEW content absent from the original index, so each FAILS on the pre-coverage collection (degrade or missing facts/source) and PASSES once the conduct docs are ingested — i.e. they measure the coverage gain.

cases.question: Who does the VinUni Student Code of Conduct apply to?
What is the purpose of the VinUni Student Code of Conduct?
What levels of disciplinary action can a VinUni student face for violations?
How can someone report suspected student misconduct at VinUni?
Sinh viên VinUni vi phạm có thể bị xử lý kỷ luật ở những mức nào?
Bộ Quy tắc ứng xử của sinh viên VinUni áp dụng cho những ai?
